channel.title: The Inconvenience
channel.description: A YewForge Digital publication: weekly issues and evidence-led experimental dispatches.

item.title: The Digital Trinity
item.description: An exploratory comparison of fifteen hypothetical generated responses across awakening, horror and beauty, with timings and limitations.

item.title: How Not to Lose Your Head
item.description: Solo development as orchestration, external memory, AI agents and founder judgement.
